parameters.jsCode:
const data = $json; const emailSubject = `[UrbanNest] New Ticket #${data.ticket_id} - ${data.category} (Urgency: ${data.urgency}/5)`; const emailBody = `

New Support Ticket Assigned

Ticket ID #${data.ticket_id}
Category ${data.category}
Urgency ${data.urgency}/5
Customer ${data.customer_email}
Segment ${data.customer_segment}
Assigned To ${data.assigned_to}
Draft Generated ${data.draft_generated === 'TRUE' ? 'Yes' : 'No - Manual response needed'}

Classification Reason

${data.reasoning}

View Ticket in Freshdesk

This is an automated notification from the UrbanNest CX System.

`; return { to: data.assigned_to, subject: emailSubject, body: emailBody, ticket_id: data.ticket_id };
